"CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgCanvas.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgFill.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgInitializer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgRender.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgSaver.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgScene.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgShape.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgTaskScheduler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/renderer/tvgText.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/svg/tvgSvgBuilder.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/svg/tvgSvgCssStyle.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/svg/tvgSvgLoader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/svg/tvgSvgPath.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/svg/tvgSvgUtil.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/svg/tvgXmlParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/ttf/tvgTtfLoader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/ttf/tvgTtfReader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/lottie/tvgLottieAnimation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/thorvg-1.dir/src/loaders/raw/tvgRawLoader.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libthorvg-1.a
